display.purpose: Primary KPI values — revenue, deals, calls. Always white. The number the user came to see.

headline.purpose: Secondary metric values in smaller card hierarchies.

title.purpose: Section headings when explicitly needed. Used sparingly.

body.purpose: Table cell text, AI insight copy, form labels, narrative. Cap at 65–75ch for prose.

label.purpose: Button text, badge values, nav links, sub-labels.

eyebrow.purpose: Card section headers — 10px uppercase tracking-widest. Established system pattern; maintain on all new cards.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Accountability lock overlay only. Lifts the overlay card above blurred content. The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Default for all state transitions: button hover, nav link active, input focus, badge change.

motion.name: ease-medium
motion.purpose: Slightly longer for panels or overlays that enter the viewport.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Grid switches from 2 to 4 columns for KPI cards. Page padding increases from 24px to 32px.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Sales page switches to 3-column layout (metrics left, form right).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Agency Gold CTA. Used for AI triggers, data sync, and primary form submissions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #c9a96e; color: #000000; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #b8975c; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9a96e; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: KPI Card
components.description: Primary data container. Hosts a metric label, value, trend badge, goal bar, and sparkline.
components.html:
Total Revenue

$124,500

↑12.3%
components.css: .ds-kpi-card { background-color: #111111; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; min-height: 168px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-kpi-card__header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-kpi-card__label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b7280; } .ds-kpi-card__icon { color: #6b7280; } .ds-kpi-card__body { margin-top: 12px; } .ds-kpi-card__value { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-trend-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-trend-badge--up { background-color: #0b2a17; color: #4ade80; } .ds-trend-badge--down { background-color: #2a0b0b; color: #f87171; } .ds-trend-badge__arrow { font-size: 10px; } .ds-goal-bar { margin-top: 12px; height: 2px; width: 100%; background-color: #1f2937; border-radius: 9999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-goal-bar__fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-goal-bar__fill--green { background-color: #22c55e; } .ds-goal-bar__fill--amber { background-color: #f59e0b; } .ds-goal-bar__fill--red { background-color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Nav Bar
components.description: Sticky top navigation. Brand mark in Agency Gold. Active link on white pill.
components.html: NEW SZNMasterSalesAdsSettingCall Logs
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; overflow-x: auto; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); background-color: rgba(10,10,10,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); padding: 10px 32px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav__brand { margin-right: 12px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: #c9a96e; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav__link { white-space: nowrap; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #6b7280; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #d1d5db; } .ds-nav__link--active { background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Auth and form field. Semi-transparent dark surface, Agency Gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; color: #ffffff; font-size: 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(201,169,110,0.4); background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); }

components.name: Outcome Badge
components.description: Semantic state pill for call outcomes. Full state vocabulary: won / declined / lost / gold / neutral.
components.html: Closed PIFOffer DeclinedNot A FitNo ShowDrag Over Show
components.css: .ds-badge-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; background: #111111; padding: 16px; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-outcome-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-outcome-badge--won { background-color: #0b2a17; color: #4ade80; } .ds-outcome-badge--lost { background-color: #2a0b0b; color: #f87171; } .ds-outcome-badge--warning { background-color: #2a1f0b; color: #f59e0b; } .ds-outcome-badge--gold { background-color: #2a230b; color: #c9a96e; } .ds-outcome-badge--neutral { background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #9ca3af; }

components.name: Trend Badge
components.description: Inline KPI directional indicator. Up = green, Down = red.
components.css: .ds-tbadge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-tbadge--up { background-color: #0b2a17; color: #4ade80; } .ds-tbadge--down { background-color: #2a0b0b; color: #f87171; } .ds-tbadge__arrow { font-size: 10px; }

narrative.overview:
NEW SZN is built for the moment you open a dashboard and immediately know where you stand. Competition is the interface. Revenue, close rate, pacing against goal — every number is a score. Red means behind. Green means winning. The UI does not editorialize, soften, or celebrate prematurely. It reports.

The aesthetic derives from that purpose: near-black surfaces (#0a0a0a), dark panel cards (#111111), one gold accent (#c9a96e) that marks the brand and the most important data points. No gradients, no decorative shadows, no animation for its own sake. Density is a feature — every metric visible without scrolling is a design win.

Anti-references: not Notion or Linear minimal (this system is dense, not sparse), not generic SaaS blue-sidebar beige, not crypto neon-on-black. The reference is Vercel and Linear's dark mode polish: deliberate typography, restrained accent, surfaces that feel built rather than generated.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black ground with one-step dark-panel layering — no shadows, pure tonal depth
Single gold accent used with restraint: chart lines, brand mark, primary actions, AI triggers
Semantic state vocabulary: green (winning), amber (watch), red (behind), gold (distinctive/brand)
Inter throughout — one family, full weight range from 400 to 700
Density over airiness — data that fits without scrolling beats data that breathes

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Agency Gold (#c9a96e) appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Gold is a signal color, not a decoration color. Every additional gold usage dilutes its meaning.

rules.name: The Tonal Layering Rule
rules.body: #0a0a0a → #111111 → rgba(255,255,255,0.03–0.08). Never add box-shadow to a resting card. Depth is tone, not shadow.

rules.name: The One Shadow Rule
rules.body: shadow-2xl appears once: on the accountability lock overlay. Any proposed new shadow must justify the same level of functional necessity.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards do not need box-shadow. Tonal contrast between #111111 and #0a0a0a reads as elevation already.

rules.name: The Data-First Rule
rules.body: KPI values are always white (#ffffff). Supporting context is always gray. The number is the signal; the label is the whisper. Never invert.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Inter only. No second typeface. No serif display, no mono data labels. Weight variation is the full typographic range.

dos: Do keep Agency Gold rare — brand mark, chart lines, primary buttons, AI triggers only.
Do use tonal layering for depth: #0a0a0a → #111111 → rgba(255,255,255,0.03–0.08).
Do use the semantic state palette consistently: green = wins, red = losses, amber = warnings.
Do keep KPI values in white (#ffffff). Never downgrade primary values to gray.
Do keep cards at #111111, 16px radius, 20px padding. Consistency is trust.
Do migrate auth screens (login, forgot-password, reset-password) from violet to Agency Gold.
Do use Inter exclusively at every type size.
Do maintain the eyebrow label pattern (10px, uppercase, tracking-widest, #6b7280) on all cards.
Do treat the accountability lock/blur as intentional UX — never remove it.
Do pull goal progress thresholds from the API. They are admin-configurable per client.
donts: Don't use Agency Gold as a hover tint, border stripe, or background wash on neutral surfaces.
Don't add box-shadow to cards, panels, or containers at rest.
Don't add decorative motion. No entrance animations, hover lifts, or loading choreography.
Don't make the interface feel like Notion/Linear minimal — sparse, gray, desktop-minimal.
Don't make the interface feel like generic SaaS (blue sidebar, white cards, dropdowns everywhere).
Don't make the interface feel like crypto/DeFi dashboards — neon borders, glowing elements, animated gradients.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient).
Don't hardcode goal progress thresholds — they are admin-configurable per client.
